edition"},{"s":"zenvo-tsr-s-2019","y":2019,"k":"Zenvo","m":"TSR-S","c":"R","p":906,"h":"https://pub-b1b0dda9cb0644008ffedffa8be50cbf.r2.dev/heros/ZEN_TSRS_19.webp","q":"2019 zenvo tsr-s"}]</script> <script>
  (() => {
    const header  = document.getElementById('site-header');
    const burger  = document.getElementById('site-burger');
    const mobile  = document.getElementById('site-mobile-nav');
    const input   = document.getElementById('site-search-input');
    const results = document.getElementById('site-search-results');
    const indexEl = document.getElementById('site-search-index');
    if (!header || !input || !results || !indexEl) return;

    /* ── Desktop mega menus: hover opens (CSS); click/tap toggles; Esc closes ─ */
    const groups = [...document.querySelectorAll('[data-group]')];
    const closeGroups = (except) => groups.forEach(g => {
      if (g !== except) { g.classList.remove('open'); g.querySelector('.nav-trigger')?.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); }
    });
    groups.forEach(g => {
      const btn = g.querySelector('.nav-trigger');
      btn?.addEventListener('click', e => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        const open = g.classList.toggle('open');
        btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
        closeGroups(g);
      });
    });
    document.addEventListener('click', e => { if (!e.target.closest('[data-group]')) closeGroups(); });

    /* ── Mobile menu toggle ─────────────────────────────── */
    function setMenu(open) {
      burger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
      burger.setAttribute('aria-label', open ? 'Close menu' : 'Open menu');
      mobile.hidden = !open;
      header.classList.toggle('open', open);
      document.body.style.overflow = open ? 'hidden' : '';
    }
    burger?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      setMenu(burger.getAttribute('aria-expanded') !== 'true');
    });
    mobile?.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.closest('.site-mobile-link')) setMenu(false);
    });
    document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        if (burger?.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true') setMenu(false);
        closeGroups();
      }
    });
    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
      if (window.innerWidth > 920 && burger?.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true') setMenu(false);
    });

    /* ── Search index ───────────────────────────────────── */
    let INDEX = [];
    try { INDEX = JSON.parse(indexEl.textContent || '[]'); } catch {}

    let active = -1;
    let lastMatches = [];

    function score(item, terms) {
      let s = 0;
      for (const t of terms) {
        if (!item.q.includes(t)) return -1;
        if (item.q.startsWith(t)) s += 10;
        else if (item.q.includes(' ' + t)) s += 5;
        else s += 1;
      }
      return s;
    }

    function search(qRaw) {
      const q = qRaw.trim().toLowerCase();
      if (!q) return [];
      const terms = q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
      const out = [];
      for (const it of INDEX) {
        const sc = score(it, terms);
        if (sc >= 0) out.push({ sc, it });
      }
      out.sort((a, b) => b.sc - a.sc);
      return out.slice(0, 8).map(r => r.it);
    }

    // Empty-state suggestions: a fresh random handful so the dropdown is useful
    // the moment it opens, before the user types anything.
    function featured(n = 8) {
      const pool = INDEX.slice();
      for (let i = pool.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
        const j = (Math.random() * (i + 1)) | 0;
        [pool[i], pool[j]] = [pool[j], pool[i]];
      }
      return pool.slice(0, n);
    }

    // Featured cars when the box is empty, live results once typing starts.
    function refresh() {
      if (input.value.trim()) { lastMatches = search(input.value); render(lastMatches); }
      else { lastMatches = featured(); render(lastMatches, 'Trending cars'); }
    }

    function render(matches, label) {
      if (!matches.length) {
        results.hidden = true;
        results.innerHTML = '';
        active = -1;
        return;
      }
      results.hidden = false;
      const head = label ? `<div class="site-search-head">${escape(label)}</div>` : '';
      results.innerHTML = head + matches.map((it, i) => `
        <a class="site-search-row" role="option" data-i="${i}" href="/cars/${it.s}">
          <img class="site-search-thumb" src="${it.h}" alt="" loading="lazy" />
          <div class="site-search-text">
            <div class="site-search-name">${escape(it.m)}</div>
            <div class="site-search-sub">${it.y} · ${escape(it.k)}</div>
          </div>
          <span class="site-search-pi pi-${(it.c || '').toLowerCase()}">${escape(it.c || '')} · ${it.p}</span>
        </a>
      `).join('');
      active = -1;
    }

    function escape(s) {
      return String(s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, c => ({
        '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;',
      })[c]);
    }

    function setActive(i) {
      const rows = results.querySelectorAll('.site-search-row');
      rows.forEach(r => r.removeAttribute('data-active'));
      if (i >= 0 && rows[i]) {
        rows[i].setAttribute('data-active', 'true');
        rows[i].scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' });
      }
      active = i;
    }

    input.addEventListener('input', refresh);
    input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
      closeGroups();
      refresh();
    });
    input.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (!lastMatches.length) return;
        setActive((active + 1) % lastMatches.length);
      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (!lastMatches.length) return;
        setActive(active <= 0 ? lastMatches.length - 1 : active - 1);
      } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
        const i = active >= 0 ? active : 0;
        const it = lastMatches[i];
        if (it) { e.preventDefault(); location.href = '/cars/' + it.s; }
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        input.blur();
        results.hidden = true;
      }
    });

    document.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (!header.contains(e.target)) results.hidden = true;
    });

    document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      const tag = (e.target?.tagName || '').toLowerCase();
      const typing = tag === 'input' || tag === 'textarea' || e.target?.isContentEditable;
      if ((e.key === '/' && !typing) ||
          ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key.toLowerCase() === 'k')) {
        e.preventDefault();
        input.focus();
        input.select();
      }
    });
  })();
</script> <div class="page-body"> <section class="page-head"> <h1 class="page-title">All cars</h1> <p class="page-sub"> <b>622</b> cars · <b>87</b> manufacturers. Filter and sort the full catalogue.
</p> </section> <div class="filter-bar" id="filter-bar"> <div class="filter-group"> <span class="filter-label">Class</span> <div class="filter-chips"> <button type="button" class="chip chip-pi chip-pi-d" data-filter="class" data-value="D">D</button><button type="button" class="chip chip-pi chip-pi-c" data-filter="class" data-value="C">C</button><button type="button" class="chip chip-pi chip-pi-b" data-filter="class" data-value="B">B</button><button type="button" class="chip chip-pi chip-pi-a" data-filter="class" data-value="A">A</button><button type="button" class="chip chip-pi chip-pi-s1" data-filter="class" data-value="S1">S1</button><button type="button" class="chip chip-pi chip-pi-s2" data-filter="class" data-value="S2">S2</button><button type="button" class="chip     <line x1="13" y1="7" x2="13" y2="23" stroke="#33333a" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="6" y1="7" x2="20" y2="7" stroke="#33333a" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="6" y1="23" x2="20" y2="23" stroke="#33333a" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="2" y="2" width="6" height="10" rx="2" fill="#3a3a42"/>
    <rect x="18" y="2" width="6" height="10" rx="2" fill="#3a3a42"/>
    <rect x="2" y="18" width="6" height="10" rx="2" fill="#ff3f34"/>
    <rect x="18" y="18" width="6" height="10" rx="2" fill="#ff3f34"/>
  </svg></span> </div> <div class="cc-facestats"> <div class="fs"> <span class="fk">SPD</span> <span class="fv">3.2</span> </div><div class="fs"> <span class="fk">HND</span> <span class="fv">3.5</span> </div><div class="fs"> <span class="fk">ACC</span> <span class="fv">1.9</span> </div><div class="fs"> <span class="fk">BRK</span> <span class="fv">1.8</span> </div><div class="fs"> <span class="fk">LCH</span> <span class="fv">2.8</span> </div><div class="fs"> <span class="fk">OFF</span> <span class="fv">5.2</span> </div> </div> </div> </a> </div> </div> </main> <script>
    (() => {
      const grid    = document.getElementById('cars-grid');
      const bar     = document.getElementById('filter-bar');
      const sort    = document.getElementById('sort-by');
      const reset   = document.getElementById('filter-reset');
      const counter = document.getElementById('cars-count');
      if (!grid || !bar) return;

      const cells = Array.from(grid.querySelectorAll('.car-cell'));
      const filters = { class: new Set(), rarity: new Set(), drivetrain: new Set() };

      function apply() {
        let visible = 0;
        for (const cell of cells) {
          const ok =
            (!filters.class.size      || filters.class.has(cell.dataset.class)) &&
            (!filters.rarity.size     || filters.rarity.has(cell.dataset.rarity)) &&
            (!filters.drivetrain.size || filters.drivetrain.has(cell.dataset.drive));
          cell.style.display = ok ? '' : 'none';
          if (ok) visible++;
        }
        counter.textContent = `${visible} car${visible === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;

        const [key, dir] = sort.value.split('-');
        const keyMap = { pi: 'pi', year: 'year', power: 'power', speed: 'speed', weight: 'weight', make: 'make' };
        const k = keyMap[key];
        const mul = dir === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
        const ordered = cells.slice().sort((a, b) => {
          if (k === 'make') return mul * a.dataset.make.localeCompare(b.dataset.make);
          return mul * (Number(a.dataset[k]) - Number(b.dataset[k]));
        });
        for (const cell of ordered) grid.appendChild(cell);
      }

      bar.addEventListener('click', e => {
        const btn = e.target.closest('button.chip');
        if (!btn) return;
        const f = btn.dataset.filter, v = btn.dataset.value;
        const set = filters[f];
        if (set.has(v)) { set.delete(v); btn.removeAttribute('data-active'); }
        else            { set.add(v);    btn.setAttribute('data-active', 'true'); }
        apply();
      });

      sort.addEventListener('change', apply);

      reset.addEventListener('click', () => {
        for (const set of Object.values(filters)) set.clear();
        bar.querySelectorAll('.chip[data-active]').forEach(b => b.removeAttribute('data-active'));
        sort.value = 'pi-desc';
        apply();
      });
    })();
